task:
Fix failing CI on PR #2206: feat: refactor PPTX generator to accept TemplateConfig

## Instructions

1. `cd ~/2025slideheroes-sophie`
2. `git fetch origin && git checkout sophie/alpha/templates-step2 && git pull origin sophie/alpha/templates-step2`
3. Analyze the CI failure logs below
4. Diagnose the root cause
5. Fix the issue
6. Run `pnpm format:fix && pnpm lint:fix && pnpm typecheck` locally to verify
7. Also run any relevant tests: `pnpm test` or specific test files
8. Commit with: `git commit -m "fix: CI failure on PR #2206"`
9. Push: `git push origin sophie/alpha/templates-step2`
